purpose: Future comparison baseline for AIOSOVERwatch, Babysitter reports, and canonical drift checks.
canonicalInvariants: VR counters must derive from taxonomy or token injection, never stale hardcoded seeds.
Legacy Railway IDs are permitted only as explicit detector signatures, not as runtime targets.
Backward-compatible shims may exist, but canonical entry points must be the default target.
Any canonical change requires a new snapshot version.
All future change must be monotonic: evolve only, never de-evolve.
comparisonChecklist: Confirm runtime IDs match the Storm control plane table.
Confirm AIOSOVERwatch and Babysitter reports match the current guardian counts.
Confirm docs and memory point to this snapshot version.
Confirm no executable script defaults to legacy project/env identifiers.
Confirm every future change is monotonic and explicitly versioned.
